english: BYOB: Bring Your Own Boss - Hong Kong Beer promotion
By continuing, you confirm you understand and accept the terms for this promotion.
This promotion is open to persons aged 18+ only. Valid photo ID may be required at redemption.
Invite creation must be completed through this BYOB page using a real email, selected venue, topic, and event time.
Free beer redemption is checked manually against HK Beer records and your event details (including attendee email, selected venue, and event context).
One free beer redemption per verified attendee, per eligible invite, unless otherwise stated by HK Beer.
Redemption is available only at participating venues and only while stocks last. Venue availability and service times apply.
Offer is non-transferable, non-exchangeable, and not redeemable for cash or credit.
HK Beer may verify entries and may refuse, suspend, or cancel claims that are incomplete, misleading, duplicate, abusive, or not compliant with these terms.
HK Beer may amend, pause, or end this promotion where reasonably required, including stock limits, operational constraints, or legal requirements.
Please drink responsibly. Under Hong Kong law, intoxicating liquor must not be sold or supplied to a minor in the course of business.
I am 18 or older and I agree to the Promotion Terms & Conditions above.

Not sure which Outlook? If your email ends in @outlook.com or @hotmail.com, pick 'personal.' If it's a company email through Microsoft 365, pick 'work/school' - picking the wrong one is what causes the sign-in loop.

Want it to open straight in the Outlook desktop app instead of the browser? Pick 'Desktop App (.ics)' - it skips the web sign-in entirely and opens whatever calendar app is set as default on your computer.

This opens your calendar's own 'new event' screen, the time already blocked, the venue already selected, and the message already written. You just add the guest and hit save, the same way you normally would. We do not have access to your own calendar. We do not collect or sell personal identifying information.
Redemption is via QR Code automatically generated from BYOB page.
